summary: Iteration 20 — Tested (1) POS strict store validation, (2) loyalty config upgrade_bonus GET/PUT + tier-promotion credit, (3) global drill-downs across 6 admin dashboards, (4) Loyalty Configurator slab section, (5) accordion left menu + Fundle logo. Backend 7/7 pytest pass (3 existing iteration17 + 4 new iteration20). Frontend: 12/13 drill-down checks pass — only NPS KPI cards render an educational empty-state instead of clickable KPIs (no NPS responses in seed data → expected, not an error). Loyalty Configurator slab inputs (tier-gold-upgrade-bonus, tier-silver-upgrade-bonus) edit + save + survive reload. Accordion sidebar shows 11 section-* headers, toggle works. Real Fundle logo renders (img alt='Fundle').

issues: Hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' inside <select data-testid=cc-store>. Pre-existing, not part of iter20 — already flagged in iter19 report; CommandCenter.jsx line ~235 wraps option text in a <span>.

Empty-state correctly hides Promoters / Detractors KPI cards when there are zero responses. Not a bug — drill-down testids nps-kpi-promoters / nps-kpi-detractors only exist when data is present. Preview environment currently has 0 NPS responses, so the empty state is shown (educational cards). Validates spec: 'a clean empty state is acceptable, an error is not'.

action_items: (Optional, pre-existing) Fix Command Center cc-store <select> hydration: remove the wrapping <span> from <option> children. Same issue flagged in iter19.

(Optional) Seed at least one NPS response in preview so the NPS Promoters/Detractors drill-down KPIs (nps-kpi-promoters/detractors) become visible/clickable for end-to-end UX validation. Today the dashboard correctly shows the empty-state template instead.
critical_code_review_comments: STRICT_STORE_VALIDATION + _get_or_create_store_from_payload raising HTTPException(400) in pos_ewards_routes.py is implemented cleanly: posAddPoint wraps the resolver in try/except HTTPException and routes rejections through _log_api(status=400). api_logs entry verified end-to-end.

Upgrade-bonus credit (pos_ewards_routes.py ~line 1100–1157) correctly: (a) detects promotion by comparing old vs new tier rank in tier_rules, (b) reads upgrade_bonus from the new tier's config, (c) adds to both points_balance and lifetime_points_earned in the same $inc, (d) writes points_ledger entry with type='bonus', reference_type='tier_upgrade', reference_id=txn_id. All verified via DB read-back.

DEFAULT_CONFIG.tier_rules now includes upgrade_bonus per tier and loyalty_routes.py backfills missing upgrade_bonus on every GET — solid defensive default. TierCreatePayload.upgrade_bonus has default 0; persist round-trips correctly via PUT.

Frontend KPICard accepts onClick and renders cursor-pointer/hover — confirmed working on Sales (kpi-total-rev, kpi-total-txns), Loyalty (tier-gold, tier-silver), Campaign (kpi-camp-total), Customer (kpi-total-cust), Executive Summary (es-kpi-txns, es-kpi-base). All open DrillDownModal with drilldown-close working.

AdminLayout.jsx accordion (sectionForPath + collapsed state) works: 11 section-* headers visible, only the active section auto-expanded, click toggles open/close. Fundle logo image renders via brand.config.js platformLogoUrl='/fundle-logo.png'.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on testable surfaces (Sales/Loyalty/Campaign/Customer/ExecSummary drill-downs, Loyalty Configurator slab edit+save+persist, accordion menu toggle, Fundle logo). NPS drill-down not exercisable in preview because there are 0 NPS responses → empty state, not an error.

test_credentials: Super admin superadmin@fundle.io / Fundle@2026 (portal=crm). POS API: kazo_default cred from pos_credentials collection (read via Mongo, matches pytest pattern).
seed_data_creation: Pytest provisions per-test stores (PYTEST_STORE_*, PYT_PROMO_*) and tears them down in fixture cleanup. Creates a fresh customer (random 9XXXXXXXXX mobile) for the tier-promotion test and deletes after. No persistent test data left behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/iteration20_upgrade_bonus_and_strict_store_test.py tests/iteration17_store_resolution_test.py -v` for the full iter20 regression (7 tests, ~12s). The upgrade-bonus test temporarily sets gold.upgrade_bonus=4321, posts a big bill against a freshly-provisioned store with a fresh mobile, then restores config + cleans up. If the loyalty config schema changes, update the gold-tier lookup in TestUpgradeBonusCredit. The hydration warning on Command Center cc-store <select> is the only pre-existing console error and is unrelated to iter20.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional issues found in this iteration. Both reversed behaviours (strict store rejection + upgrade-bonus credit on promotion) work end-to-end and are persisted/logged correctly.
